name: issueflow
description: Issue-driven Git Flow-lite workflow skills for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Issue-driven Git Flow-lite workflows for Codex
interface.longDescription: A bundled skill pack for discovering or clarifying issues, planning waves, dispatching worktrees, proving changes, merging safely, and capturing reusable learning.
defaultPrompt: Use issueflow to brainstorm this feature into issues.
Use issueflow to plan the next autonomous wave.
Use issueflow to compound what this merge taught us.
